display.name: Share of COVID-19 tests that are positive

source.name: UK Government Coronavirus (COVID-19) Dashboard
source.additionalInfo:
During the holiday period, data will continue to be updated daily but with differences in coverage depending on the reporting schedule of each nation. The following schedule will apply:  
– England: updated daily 
– Northern Ireland: no data from 24th - 28th December
– Wales: no data on 25th December and 1st January
– Scotland: no data from 25th - 28th December and 1st - 4th January

Trends should be interpreted with caution over this period due to the changes in frequency of reporting. UK totals will not be shown on during this period due to varying availability by nation.
